description.en: Reliable, ordered, connection-oriented byte stream transport. Used by HTTP, SSH, FTP, SMTP and most application protocols that require guaranteed delivery.
description.zh: 可靠、有序、面向连接的字节流传输协议。HTTP、SSH、FTP、SMTP等大多数需要可靠传输的应用协议都基于TCP。

sequenceNumber.en: Sequence number of the first data byte in this segment
sequenceNumber.zh: 本段数据第一个字节的序列号

acknowledgmentNumber.en: Next sequence number the sender expects to receive
acknowledgmentNumber.zh: 发送方期望接收的下一个序列号

dataOffset.zh: 头部长度，单位32位字 (最小5, 最大15)

flags.en: Control flags: URG, ACK, PSH, RST, SYN, FIN etc.
flags.zh: 控制标志位: URG, ACK, PSH, RST, SYN, FIN 等

windowSize.en: Receive window size in bytes, for flow control
windowSize.zh: 接收窗口大小（字节），用于流量控制

checksum.en: Header and data checksum for error detection
checksum.zh: 头部和数据的校验和，用于错误检测

urgentPointer.en: Offset of urgent data end, valid only when URG flag is set
urgentPointer.zh: 紧急数据结束偏移，仅URG标志置位时有效

options.en: Variable-length options (MSS, window scale, timestamps, etc.)
options.zh: 可变长度选项 (MSS, 窗口缩放, 时间戳等)
